'''âr-b-f''' ('''rabafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moider|moider]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moider|moider]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| rabafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabafithi|rabafithi]] || [[word:rabafiji|rabafiji]] || [[word:rabafishi|rabafishi]] || [[word:rabafi|rabafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabafuthuth|rabafuthuth]] || [[word:rabafujuj|rabafujuj]] || [[word:rabafushush|rabafushush]] || [[word:rabaf|rabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabafuthu|rabafuthu]] || [[word:rabafuju|rabafuju]] || [[word:rabafushu|rabafushu]] || [[word:rabafu|rabafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabafufuth|rabafufuth]] || [[word:rabafufuj|rabafufuj]] || [[word:rabafufush|rabafufush]] || [[word:rabafuf|rabafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabafethe|rabafethe]] || [[word:rabafeje|rabafeje]] || [[word:rabafeshe|rabafeshe]] || [[word:rabafe|rabafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabafothoth|rabafothoth]] || [[word:rabafojoj|rabafojoj]] || [[word:rabafoshosh|rabafoshosh]] || [[word:rabaf|rabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabafotho|rabafotho]] || [[word:rabafojo|rabafojo]] || [[word:rabafosho|rabafosho]] || [[word:rabafo|rabafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabafofoth|rabafofoth]] || [[word:rabafofoj|rabafofoj]] || [[word:rabafofosh|rabafofosh]] || [[word:rabafof|rabafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabafĂŠthĂŠ|rabafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rabafĂŠjĂŠ|rabafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rabafĂŠshĂŠ|rabafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rabafĂŠ|rabafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabafathath|rabafathath]] || [[word:rabafajaj|rabafajaj]] || [[word:rabafashash|rabafashash]] || [[word:rabaf|rabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabafatha|rabafatha]] || [[word:rabafaja|rabafaja]] || [[word:rabafasha|rabafasha]] || [[word:rabafa|rabafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabafafath|rabafafath]] || [[word:rabafafaj|rabafafaj]] || [[word:rabafafash|rabafafash]] || [[word:rabafaf|rabafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rabafasha|rabafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorabafasha|gorabafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirabafasha|gokirabafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rabafnĂŒsha|rabafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorabafnknĂŒsha|gorabafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirabafnĂŒsha|gokirabafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rabafshĂ«sha|rabafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorabafnkshĂ«sha|gorabafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirabafshĂ«sha|gokirabafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabafrosha|rabafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabafnkrosha|gorabafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabafrosha|gokirabafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rabafmusha|rabafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabafnkmusha|gorabafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabafmusha|gokirabafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rabafsherasha|rabafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorabafnksherasha|gorabafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirabafsherasha|gokirabafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rabafngasha|rabafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorabafnkngasha|gorabafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirabafngasha|gokirabafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rabafyasha|rabafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorabafnkyasha|gorabafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirabafyasha|gokirabafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rabafyamasha|rabafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorabafnkyamasha|gorabafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirabafyamasha|gokirabafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabafnĂŒshĂ«sha|rabafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gorabafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokirabafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabafnĂŒrosha|rabafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabafnknĂŒrosha|gorabafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabafnĂŒrosha|gokirabafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabafnĂŒmusha|rabafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabafnknĂŒmusha|gorabafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabafnĂŒmusha|gokirabafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabafshĂ«nĂŒsha|rabafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gorabafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokirabafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabafshĂ«rosha|rabafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabafnkshĂ«rosha|gorabafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabafshĂ«rosha|gokirabafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabafshĂ«musha|rabafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabafnkshĂ«musha|gorabafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabafshĂ«musha|gokirabafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabafronĂŒsha|rabafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabafnkronĂŒsha|gorabafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabafronĂŒsha|gokirabafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabafroshĂ«sha|rabafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabafnkroshĂ«sha|gorabafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabafroshĂ«sha|gokirabafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabafromusha|rabafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabafnkromusha|gorabafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabafromusha|gokirabafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabafmunĂŒsha|rabafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabafnkmunĂŒsha|gorabafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabafmunĂŒsha|gokirabafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabafmushĂ«sha|rabafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabafnkmushĂ«sha|gorabafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabafmushĂ«sha|gokirabafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabafmurosha|rabafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabafnkmurosha|gorabafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabafmurosha|gokirabafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rabaf|rabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠbĂŠf|rĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horabaf|horabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠbĂŠf|horĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorabaf|hohorabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠbĂŠf|hohorĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒrabaf|nĂŒrabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŒrĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrabaf|nĂŒnĂŒrabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻrabaf|nĂŻrabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŻrĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrabaf|nĂŻnĂŻrabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurabaf|lurabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠbĂŠf|lurĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurabaf|lulurabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠbĂŠf|lulurĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirabaf|lirabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠbĂŠf|lirĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirabaf|lilirabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠbĂŠf|lilirĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korabaf|korabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠbĂŠf|korĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorabaf|kokorabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠbĂŠf|kokorĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerabaf|kerabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠbĂŠf|kerĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerabaf|kekerabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠbĂŠf|kekerĂŠbĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
